channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Justin Turner agrees to $6 million, 1-year deal with the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: MESA, Ariz. (AP) — Justin Turner has agreed to a $6 million, one-year deal with the Chicago Cubs, according to a person with direct knowledge of the situation, giving the team additional infield depth.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High school girls basketball rankings Feb. 18, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: High school girls basketball rankings: Half Moon Bay enters the rankings, Oakland Tech cracks the Top 10 alongside St.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Netflix will bid for NFL Sunday afternoon games, exec says
item.description: Could Sunday afternoon NFL games be streamed on Netflix? Chief Content Officer Bela Bejaria said in an interview that the streaming platform will bid for it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohtani throws a 2nd bullpen session as he makes his way back to the mound for the Dodgers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Shohei Ohtani threw his second bullpen session of spring training on Tuesday, continuing the process of his return to the mound for the Los Angeles Dodgers. Ohtani had his first bullpen session on Saturday. He hopes to pitch this season for the first time since Aug.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dodgers' Dustin May recalls 'life-altering event' that derailed his 2024 season
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher Dustin May talked publicly for the first time about the emergency surgery he underwent after a piece of lettuce caused a perforation in his esophagus.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Transgender NCAA women's champ 'willing to sit down with' Trump amid calls for title to be rescinded
item.description: As the Education Department has called for transgender athletes' NCAA titles to be vacated, one of those winners is "willing to sit down with" the president to discuss to controversy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Novak Djokovic says majority of tennis pros believe 'favoritism' is responsible Jannik Sinner's short ban
item.description: Novak Djokovic, a 24-time Grand Slam winner, said this week that the "majority" of tennis pros were not happy with the WADA decision to ban Jannik Sinner for just three months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge disagrees with Soto's conclusion that Mets have better chance for titles than Yankees
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Aaron Judge naturally takes issue with Juan Soto's conclusion that the New York Mets have a better chance to win World Series titles than the Yankees.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: The All-Star break is almost over. It's time for the stretch run toward the NBA playoffs
item.description: The trade deadline is gone. The All-Star break is about to end. Luka Doncic is with the Los Angeles Lakers.Jimmy Butler is with the Golden State Warriors. Anthony Davis is with the Dallas Mavericks, though it's unknown when he'll play again. The dust has settled. It's time for the stretch run.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that up into the air, too, in a fitting finish to his All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ludvig Aberg rallies down the stretch at Torrey Pines to win the Genesis Invitational
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Ludvig Aberg never felt worse leaving a golf course than three weeks ago at Torrey Pines when he shared the 36-hole lead only to get violently ill from a stomach ailment and stagger to the finish with a 79.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies lose heartbreaker at first place New Mexico
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE (ABC4 Sports) - With first place in the Mountain West men’s basketball standings on the line, Utah State (22-4, 12-3 MW) fell just short on Sunday in Albuquerque, dropping an 82-79 thriller at The Pit. This marked the second time in two weeks the Aggies have lost to the Lobos.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Seven more massage therapists accuse Ravens' Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct: report
item.description: A total of 16 massage therapists from eight Baltimore-area spas have now shared accounts with the Baltimore Banner.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Runnin' Utes stun #17 Kansas, 74-67
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 24 points and became Utah's career leader in made 3-pointers as the Utes beat No. 17 Kansas 74-67 on Saturday night. Madsen's fifth and final 3-pointer of the game with 1:58 to play gave him the Utah career record of 288 made 3s.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 58, Victory Christian Academy 44
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in Chula Vista on Tuesday night with Montgomery defeating Victory Christian Academy 58-44. Aztecs were lead by Senior JJ Sanchez. Montgomery was down at half and got going in the 2nd half for the double digit win.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR driver Ryan Blaney previews Daytona 500
item.description: Ryan Blaney, 2023 NASCAR Cup Series champion, joined NewsNation to talk Sunday's Daytona 500, which marks the 67th running of the event.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Muni will be free for NBA-All Star, Lunar New Year weekend, SFMTA announces
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- With thousands of people expected to descend on San Francisco this weekend for the NBA All-Stars and Lunar New Year Parade, officials are urging people to leave their cars at home.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4
